name: TI-IOC Match - Domain Names
conditions_text: when any of Hostname (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) OpenCTI - Domain Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY TI-IOC Match - Domain Names on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

RED_list: Event name: Threat Intel Match - Domain Names
